evidence.velocity_vs_rigour: maintain a strong focus on data accuracy, quality, and usability
evidence.velocity_vs_rigour_explanation: The only strong signal present is a quality/accuracy focus with no velocity or speed language anywhere in the JD, so rigour dominates by default.
evidence.domain_risk: Our mission is to drive sustainable, measurable value for our clients through innovative solutions and deep industry insights.
evidence.domain_risk_explanation: The role affects client business decisions in procurement/supply chain consulting but carries no explicit regulatory, audit, or financial-reporting consequence, so it is moderate.
evidence.data_team_maturity: The primary BI platform used in this role will be Sigma, so hands-on Sigma experience is highly desirable.
evidence.data_team_maturity_explanation: A specific platform is named as the in-use tool for responsibilities, alongside a mandate to 'improve existing reporting processes', indicating an established practice being grown rather than built from zero.
evidence.jd_authorship: Strong SQL skills and experience working with databases, data models, joins, KPIs, calculations, and reporting logic.
evidence.jd_authorship_explanation: The requirements list precise technical elements (joins, KPIs, calculations, reporting logic) and a named platform, giving a concrete picture of daily work, so it is hiring_manager.
evidence.stakeholder_orientation: translate ambiguous business questions into robust reporting solutions, and lead the delivery of high-quality dashboards and analytics products
evidence.stakeholder_orientation_explanation: The role is centered on owning the BI/reporting platform and dashboards themselves rather than a specific commercial or finance function, placing it in internal_data.
evidence.autonomy_level: work independently with senior stakeholders...and lead the delivery of high-quality dashboards and analytics products
evidence.autonomy_level_explanation: The verbs 'lead' and 'work independently' combined with ownership of solution design over ambiguous questions indicate strategic autonomy.
evidence.ai_role: explore the use of n8n, AI agents, and other automation or agentic AI solutions to enhance reporting workflows, generate insights from dashboards, automate recurring analysis
evidence.ai_role_explanation: The candidate is expected to use AI agents/automation tools to accelerate their own reporting workflows, making the AI the candidate's tool (ai_user).
evidence.testing_framing: maintain a strong focus on data accuracy, quality, and usability
evidence.testing_framing_explanation: Data accuracy and quality are framed as something the candidate personally maintains as part of the role, using an ownership verb, so it is responsibility.
evidence.loss_aversion_framing_explanation: The JD is framed in delivery and capability terms with no compliance, regulatory, or risk-register language.
evidence.greenfield_vs_fix: Ability to work independently, manage multiple priorities, improve existing reporting processes, and maintain a strong focus on data accuracy, quality, and usability.
evidence.greenfield_vs_fix_explanation: The explicit call to 'improve existing reporting processes' signals fix/scale work on an established practice rather than greenfield building.
